notes: I-3/I-4 tariffs are uniform nationwide (no regional variation). LWBP rate used; WBP peak rate = K×LWBP where K=1.4–2.0 (system-specific). BPP is generation cost only (BPP Pembangkitan), not full cost-of-supply. BPP source: Kepmen ESDM 169/2021 (FY2020, valid until superseded). Emission factor: KESDM Tier 2 Operating Margin, 2019 vintage (data/grid_emission_factors.xlsx).
